name: File Write
description: Create or overwrite a file at a given path with the provided content. Creates parent directories if they don't exist.

parameters.name: path
parameters.description: File path to write (relative to project root or absolute)

parameters.name: content
parameters.description: Full content to write to the file

parameters.name: createDirectories
parameters.description: Create parent directories if they don't exist

parameters.name: overwrite
parameters.description: Allow overwriting existing files. When false, fails if file already exists.

outputDescription: Confirmation with the file path and bytes written. Returns an error if overwrite is false and the file exists.
author: openspace
